variants: Bastien Clerc is an active Organizer with Sapphire Ridge Society, where he dedicates his time to philanthropy and community engagement. He received his professional license or certification as a Mythic Correspondent Fellowship, marking him as a significant figure in his field. His academic pursuits enjoyed substantial funding from the Hummingbird Wisdom Grant, which supported critical research initiatives. Under the mentorship of Uwe Mertens, Bastien developed his scholarly capabilities and direction. His written contributions have found a home within Silken Crocus Books, adding to his reputation as an esteemed author.
